zh.lifeSummary: 當William Blake於1562年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特奧維 斯度維時，他的父親John "The Elder" Blake42歲，母親Margaret Taunton38歲。他於1588年與Anne在英國艾可蕾托 巴多福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1642年在英國薩默塞特比特明斯特享年80歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布拉格頓聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Blake于1562年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特奧維 斯度維时，他的父亲John "The Elder" Blake42岁，母亲Margaret Taunton38岁。他于1588年与Anne在英国艾可蕾托 巴多福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1642年在英国薩默塞特比特明斯特享年80岁，埋葬在英国英格兰薩默塞特布拉格頓聖 安德也斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Blake was born in 1562, in Over Stowey, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, his father, John "The Elder" Blake, was 42 and his mother, Margaret Taunton, was 38. He married Anne in 1588, in Little Baddow, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1642, in Pitminster, Somerset, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in St Andrew's Church, Blagdon, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: William Blake(이)가 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 버 스타우이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John "The Elder" Blake(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Taunton(은)는 38세였다. 그는 1588년 영국 에세스 리틀 바도에서 Anne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1642년 영국 서머세트 피트민스터에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 블래그던 스트 앤드루'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.Easton On Hill, Northamptonshire, Englan: Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Saint Andrew and Mary Churchyard, Pitmin: St Andrew's Church, Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Blake nasceu em 1562, em Over Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John "The Elder" Blake, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Taunton, tinha 38 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne em 1588, em Little Baddow, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1642, em Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em St Andrew's Church, Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Easton On Hill, Northamptonshire, Englan: эастон он т хилл, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Saint Andrew and Mary Churchyard, Pitmin: ст андрю'с чурч, благдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Blake родился в 1562 г. в местности овир стоуи, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John "The Elder" Blake было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Taunton, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne в 1588 г. в местности литл баддоу, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1642 г. в местности питминстир, сомирсет, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности ст андрю'с чурч, благдон, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Easton On Hill, Northamptonshire, Englan: Easton on the Hill, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.Saint Andrew and Mary Churchyard, Pitmin: St Andrew's Church, Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Blake nació en 1562, en Over Stowey, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John "The Elder" Blake, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Margaret Taunton, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Anne en 1588, en Little Baddow, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1642, en Pitminster, Somerset, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en St Andrew's Church, Blagdon, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
